headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Old Dominion Freight Line, Raises Price Target to $224
summary: UBS  analyst Thomas Wadewitz   maintains Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $216 to $224.
